title: Wire: Add TLS (wss:// via reverse proxy)
description:
All WebSocket traffic is currently ws:// (plaintext). This exposes metadata even before MLS is added: who is connecting to which relay, connection timing, message sizes.

Required:
- Deploy nginx or caddy as TLS terminator in front of relay
- Default relay URL changes from ws://127.0.0.1:3210/ws to wss://relay.example.com/ws
- Document self-signed cert setup for local dev
- Update CLAUDE.md with TLS architecture note
- Do NOT add TLS in the Rust binary itself — termination at proxy is simpler and battle-tested

Blocking: do not expose to real users until TLS is in place.
close_reason: TLS via reverse proxy: native-tls feature on tokio-tungstenite, --insecure dev flag, Caddy configs, mkcert setup script, CLAUDE.md section
